name: pr_cep_c_win_cnt_valconstr
_finding: CEP E2 item C §1a (D-139) DISCRIMINATOR: windowed count() with an INEQUALITY constraint val>5 (no binding). Updating val (kept >5) does NOT re-fire — a constraint-only field is not in the windowed watch mask (bind_fields is empty for count()). Confirms the exclusion is CONSTRAINT-vs-BINDING, not equality-vs-inequality. engine==oracle: W2 once.
drl: rule W2 when accumulate( E0(val > 5) over window:time(200ms); $c : count() ) then end
